description: Composition Maroon printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a short placket, short sleeves, printed tape border on the neck, sleeves, and border with lace detailing, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print coupled with the lace work is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
